name: Mag Rifle
description: Fires magnetically propelled slugs at hypersonic speeds.

name: Mag Pistol
description: A heavy pistol variation of the mag rifle.

name: Laser Pistol
description: Standard personal sidearm. Recoilless and silent.

name: Laser Rifle
description: Standard military laser rifle. High capacity but lower damage than projectile weapons.

name: Combat Rifle
description: Typical TL3 assault rifle firing cased ammunition.

name: Combat Shotgun
description: Devastating at close range but severely limited at a distance.

name: Submachine Gun
description: Compact fully-automatic weapon.

name: Sniper Rifle
description: High-powered, long-range ballistic rifle.

name: Revolver
description: Old-fashioned but reliable hand cannon.

name: Semi-Auto Pistol
description: Standard modern handgun.

name: Plasma Projector
description: Fires bolts of superheated plasma that can melt through armor.

name: Thermal Pistol
description: Short ranged anti-armor pistol.

name: Spike Thrower
description: Fires a flurry of armor-piercing darts. Incredibly lethal.

name: Small Primitive Weapon
description: Knives, daggers, or clubs.

name: Medium Primitive Weapon
description: Swords, spears, maces.

name: Large Primitive Weapon
description: Two-handed swords, halberds, great axes.

name: Medium Advanced Weapon
description: Stun batons, power swords, monoblades.

name: Large Advanced Weapon
description: Chainswords, gravity hammers.

name: Monoblade
description: A close-combat weapon fashioned from advanced materials, keeping an edge only a molecule thick.

name: Unarmed Attack
description: Punches and kicks.

name: Armored Undersuit
description: A skin-tight bodysuit of shear-thickening smart materials. Worn under normal clothing without being obvious.

name: Combat Field Uniform
description: Standard military infantry armor. Rigid plates interwoven with ballistic mesh.

name: Assault Suit
description: Heavy, powered armor that supports its own weight but feels bulky. Excellent physical protection.

name: Woven Body Armor
description: Kevlar-equivalent modern body armor.

name: Powered Armor
description: Expensive, fully powered combat suits.

name: Field Emitter
description: A pretech forcefield generator that provides protection without any actual armor layers.

name: Leather Armor
description: Hardened leather or thick hides.

name: Security Suit
description: Light, civilian-grade protective clothing offering some protection against small arms.

name: Lazarus Patch
description: If applied to a mortally wounded character within 6 rounds of them going down, they are revived with 1 HP.

name: Compad
description: A standard computing pad and communication device. Basically a futuristic smartphone.

name: Metatool
description: A heavy wand containing various power tools, cutters, welders, and diagnostic probes.

name: Comm Server
description: High-powered planetary comms and signal interception device.

name: Multicorder
description: A portable sensor suite for recording video, audio, and atmospheric data.

name: Vacc Suit
description: Standard vacuum suit for zero-G operations. Provides 12 hours of air.

name: Glowbug
description: A small stick-on light source that functions indefinitely.

name: Atmofilter
description: A respirator that filters out toxic gases and pathogens.

name: Dataslab
description: A ruggedized tablet computer used for serious data processing.

name: Survival Kit
description: Contains basic water filters, thermal blankets, and rations for harsh environments.

name: Lift
description: A powerful stimulant that instantly removes 1 System Strain and heals 1d8 HP.
